# HARDWARIO STEM

> STEM learning platform for schools — hands-on Internet-of-Things lessons and
> student projects built with the solder-free HARDWARIO TOWER kit. Ready-made
> courses, mini-courses and teaching materials. Published by HARDWARIO a.s., a
> Czech industrial / wireless IoT manufacturer based in Liberec. Available in
> English (default) and Czech (/cs/). Welcomes AI crawlers; the full page list
> is in the sitemap below.

## Pages

- [HARDWARIO STEM — English (default)](https://stem.hardwario.com/): courses, mini-courses and teaching materials
- [HARDWARIO STEM — Czech](https://stem.hardwario.com/cs/): Czech version of the platform
- [TOWER mini-course](https://stem.hardwario.com/mini-course/): introductory hands-on IoT course
- [STEM lessons](https://stem.hardwario.com/stem/): structured classroom lessons and teaching guidance
- [Projects and tutorials](https://stem.hardwario.com/projects/): practical projects built around HARDWARIO TOWER
- [English sitemap](https://stem.hardwario.com/sitemap.xml): complete, machine-readable list of English pages
- [Czech sitemap](https://stem.hardwario.com/cs/sitemap.xml): complete, machine-readable list of Czech pages

## More from HARDWARIO

- [HARDWARIO Academy](https://hardwario.academy): why TOWER fits education, teacher resources and school packages
- [HARDWARIO a.s.](https://www.hardwario.com): company site — products, solutions and services
- [HARDWARIO Documentation](https://docs.hardwario.com): technical product documentation

## Contact

- [Email ask@hardwario.com](mailto:ask@hardwario.com): enquiries from schools and teachers (phone +420 775 159 734)
